heading: Army Reserve and Air Force Reserve: warrant officers
label: 12008 Army Reserve and Air Force Reserve: warrant officers
text: The Secretary of the Army may prescribe the authorized strength of the Army Reserve in warrant officers. The Secretary of the Air Force may prescribe the authorized strength of the Air Force Reserve in warrant officers.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3223 and 8223 of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(a)(3)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
